name: procurement staff in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement staff in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoice approvals cause late payments. We send weekly reminders instead of manual tracking of invoice approvals via email.
target_audience: procurement staff in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: Delayed invoice approvals leading to late payments.
features: manual entry of invoice approval status

locked_fields.primary_problem: Delayed invoice approvals leading to late payments.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of invoice approvals via email
must_have_features: manual entry of invoice approval status
